{{Quote|Marine equipment will have to be augmented as well, unless I miss my guess, for this moon has nearly three times the open water of that dismal swamp, Betshish. I rejoice now that they found sentience on landing and removed that world from our title. It would have been a pox on our legacy.|Lile Gorsek discusses [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]|<ref name="GG 2">[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin'', Second Edition]]</ref>}}
The [[Swamp/Legends|swamp]]-[[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Betshish]] was home to a '''sentient species'''.<ref name="GG 1" /> Their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], which was located on the [[Pinooran Spur/Legends|Pinooran Spur]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] of the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]], between the [[Mogoshyn system/Legends|Mogoshyn]] and [[Kli'aar system/Legends|Kli'aar]] [[Star system/Legends|systems]], was [[Scout/Legends|scouted]] by colonists from [[Setor/Legends|Setor]] looking for possible sites for a [[Wetyin's Colony (planet)|colony]]. The [[Species/Legends|species]] went unnoticed during the initial survey of the planet, but were discovered upon the first major landing on the planet's surface. Their [[Sentience/Legends|sentience]] rendered void the Colony's title to the planet, a fact later celebrated by the scout [[Lile Gorsek]], who found the swamp-planet dismal and so was relieved not to have any ongoing connection with it.<ref name="GG 2" /> The [[Species/Legends|species]] had developed to a pre-industrial technology by the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The Empire [[Interdiction field/Legends|interdicted]] their homeworld, but never actually exploited the species.<ref name="Atlas" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[Jonatha Ariadne Caspian|Jonatha Caspian]] created this species in [[1989]] for [[West End Games]]'s ''[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin]]''.<ref name="GG 1" />
